situation: I hate my job but I am scared to quit and seek a new career.

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: Hello

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: Hello, what would you like to talk about?

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: I am having a lot of anxiety about quitting my current job. It is too stressful but pays well

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: What makes your job stressful for you?

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: I have to deal with many people in hard financial situations and it is upsetting

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: Do you help your clients to make it to a better financial situation?

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: I do, but often they are not going to get back to what they want. Many people are going to lose their home when safeguards are lifted

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: But you offer them a better future than what they have currently. It may not be what they wanted, but it helps them in the long run.

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: That is true but sometimes I feel like I should put my feelings and health first

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: I can understand that.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: Is there another job that would pay you close to what you currently make?

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: Probably not. I was with the same company for a long time and I consistently get a bonus every year

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: Is it possible to reframe how you look at your clients' dire financial situations?

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: I could try. It mostly gets to me at the end of the day

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: Some people can't do what you do because they don't have the heart to give someone else bad news. The reality is though, someone needs to fill that role and you do help people

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: That is also true. Sometimes I wonder if it really is for me though

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: I've had to deal with collections before when I was in  bad financial condition. The person on the other line was really helpful though. She was understanding,

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: It may not be for you. I think you should think about the pros and cons of keeping your position. It might make things clearer for you.

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: That is true. Maybe I just need to sit down and really think about it

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: I wouldn't stay if it really impacts your mental health in a negative way. Still, you may need to zoom out and see the bigger picture: that you provide a needed service and you do it compassionately

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: It really is a big decision

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: Thank you for the different perspective

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: No doubt, but you know in your heart what is right for you.

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: That is true. Thanks again

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: Bye

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: It's no problem. I hope you can make a decision about this situation and then be at peace with it

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: Ok, take care

situation: I have been out of work for five weeks in quarantine due to testing positive for COVID-19.  I fear that my employer will not take me back to work even once I test negative.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: Hi there, how are you feeling today?

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: Hello

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: Hi :) Is there anything you'd like to talk about? Something on your mind?

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: I'm concerned about my job. I have been out of work for the past 5 weeks because I tested positive for COVID-19.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: Oh I am so sorry to hear that! Are you at least getting sick pay? If not, are you getting advice about help you might be able to access?

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: Oh I am so sorry to hear that! Are you at least getting sick pay? If not, are you getting advice about help you might be able to access?

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: (sorry for duplication, not sure what happened there!)

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: It just keeps getting better...  I applied for the Pandemic Unemployment Assistance and was approved.  The next day, I got an email asking me to verify my identity (I am fine with that.  It actually makes good sense.)...

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: So you have been getting some assistance?

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: So I did as instructed and got the message on the website thanking me for verification.  The following week I got a physical letter saying I was approved and the award amount per week.

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: I have gone online once a week and qualified, as one is supposed to do, and still I have not received a cent.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: I see, so you are really financially struggling at the moment? Is there anywhere else you could apply for assistance? What about a foodbank?

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: Calling the customer service line is futile.  The computer just plays a recording that the agents are on other calls and then it disconnects the call.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: I hear you there - I spent a long time on hold for an official matter the other day. I guess that everyone is really desperate for help and advice right now.

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: I have been very fortunate.  People in my church have been bringing me food.  I plan on trying to go to the food bank Monday, if they are open.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: I hope that they can help you. My partner and I have used one before and they were very helpful. I felt a bit ashamed but there was no judgement at all.

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: I actually got so tired of redialing the Department of Labor and Training that I sent an email to the Lieutenant Governor of the state asking for his assistance in getting the matter resolved.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: That sounds like a very positive thing to have done. I really hope that they pay some attention to you. This situation is not your fault!

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: I have been to this food bank once before, and they actually made me feel very comfortable and welcomed and gave me an information package on other ways the parent organization may be able to assist me.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: Yes they are run by lovely people. Ours gave us a pamphlet for cheap and easy to make recipes too.

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: I am very lucky in that the organization is only 3 miles from me.  I will be looking into their rent assistance and employment assistance programs as well.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: So, at least it sounds like you have a good handle on this and are doing everything you can to help yourself, am I right?

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: I have an advantage because I have a professional background in cooking, so I can take random ingredients and turn them into wonderful and nutritious meals.  I just need to have the ingredients.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: That sounds very encouraging! It's amazing what you can make even with cheap food. Noodles , for instance, are very versatile :)

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: You are right.  I am definitely not going to sit and pout.  I am just a bit frustrated with the system.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: It's a very strange situation and I suspect that some of the authorities just feel overwhelmed and have no idea how to cope.

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: I am concerned that my boss may try to not take me back at my job.  Because this is an "at will" state, he can terminate me without cause.  Although he can not legally fire me for being ill with COVID, he can take me back and simply release me the same day saying that I have become redundant.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: That would be incredibly immoral of him. Do you feel that he is likely to do such a  thing?

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: I would not put it past him.  Sadly.  But I have taken the attitude that if it does occur, there is nothing I can do to change the situation.  I would simply pursue a charge against him for wrongful termination, and seek a new job.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: That is a very rational way to look at things. I really hope that it does not come to thank though! Thank you for talking and I wish you all the best for the coming months.

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: I may not win the suit, but I would definitely file one.  In 2000, I had an employer fire me without cause.  I sued and won that time.  Not only did they have to pay me back wages for the 90 days that the investigation took place, which was no minor sum,

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: I am glad that you'd not roll over and accept ill treatment! Well done :)

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: they were found to be guilty, so the judge granted me my wages based on the average of 80 hour weeks I had been working, all my vacation time, plus the overtime I would have received, holiday pay, and then to put a nice bow on that gift, he awarded me 5000 dollars in damages because the old company lied and said I had broken the law.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: I am afraid I need to leave now but thank you for talking :) (can you press the quit button and take the survey?) Best wishes!

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: My current employer actually knows this happened, because years ago we discussed it, and I showed him the award letter from the Department of Labor and Training, itemizing the judge's findings and the awards.

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: Thank you for your time.  Have a great holiday.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: You too!

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: Thanks for your time and support.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: Yes, all we need to do is be patient! Have a great New Year and thanks for talking.

dialog.content: Bye

dialog.content: Too right.

dialog.speaker: supporter

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: I have no doubt that he loves me very much.

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: Hahahaha! Seems that way.

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: He didn't make this lie up for me. That's an interesting thing.

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: He was living the "divorced dad" lie to A LOT of people.

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: Anybody and everybody who was far enough away to be lied to.

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: She lives in her bedroom. Only comes out to work two nights a week. DOesn't want to have anything to do with her kids (5, 9, 11, 13)

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: (sorry was afk let me catch up)

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: And she and my BF have been living that way for three years. Over a year before I even met him.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: Is it possible she is suffering from depression?

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: I would all but guarantee it.

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: It just worries me that he might treat you the same way if you were ever in the same position

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: Here's the other kicker, though...

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: She knows about me.

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: (I know. You're right. I thought that as well)

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: And how does she feel about you?

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: She doesn't care. She just wants to keep the status quo. She likes the money and security.

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: (before he was furloughed, he made very good money.)

dialog.speaker: supporter
dialog.content: I think it would be better if he  were able to come to a sensible financial solution with her. This situation is damaging for everyone.

dialog.content: Yes!

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: I agree!

dialog.speaker: seeker
dialog.content: EVERYBODY!

dialog.content: Happy New Year!
